task_completion.description: Navigate to the Jitsi Meet room 'team-standup-daily'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open, displaying the Jitsi Meet interface with the URL http://localhost:8080/team-standup-daily or the room name 'team-standup-daily' visible.

task_completion.description: Switch the meeting layout to Tile View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet interface shows the Tile View layout (participants arranged in a grid) or the Tile View toggle button in the bottom toolbar is highlighted/active.

task_completion.description: Open a text editor or terminal to create the reference file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Mousepad, gedit, nano) or a terminal window is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: List at least five keyboard shortcuts in the format 'KEY - Description'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal shows at least five valid Jitsi Meet shortcuts (e.g., M - Mute, C - Chat, W - Tile view) written with one per line in the requested format.
The text editor's title bar, save dialog, or terminal command indicates the file is named 'shortcuts_reference.txt' and located in the '/home/ga/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet application in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jitsi Meet web interface being used, rather than just a terminal or script making API calls.

integrity.description: The agent used the 'W' keyboard shortcut to switch to Tile View, rather than clicking the GUI button.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout switches to Tile View without the mouse cursor clicking the Tile View button in the toolbar.

integrity.description: The agent created the file manually or via standard commands, rather than copying a pre-existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file creation process is visible in the screenshots (e.g., typing in an editor or using terminal commands).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi Meet room URL is http://localhost:8080/team-standup-daily. The expected layout is 'tile_view' (toggled via the 'W' key). The output file must be at /home/ga/shortcuts_reference.txt and contain at least 5 valid Jitsi Meet keyboard shortcuts in the format 'KEY - Description'. Valid keys include: T (stats), M (mute), V (camera), C (chat), R (raise hand), F (thumbnails), S (fullscreen), D (screen share), W (tile view), A (quality), SPACE (push to talk), ? (help), 0 (focus own video), 1-9 (focus other videos). Note: 'E' is not a valid documented shortcut.
